name: Classic Mud Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. CRUST
- Combine chocolate chips and butter over hot water until melted and smooth.
- Add chocolate wafer crumbs, stir until well blended.
- Press into a 9-inch pie pan.
- Chill until firm.
2. FUDGE SAUCE
- In a separate bowl, combine remaining chocolate chips, heavy cream, and butter over hot water.
- Stir until melted and smooth.
- Remove from heat, stir in coffee-flavored liqueur.
- Chill for 10 minutes.
- Spread half of the sauce on the crust.
- Chill for an additional 15 minutes.
3. FILLING
- In a large bowl, combine softened ice cream and coffee-flavored liqueur.
- Pour over the fudge sauce layer in the pie pan.
- Freeze several hours or until firm.
- Serve with remaining warm fudge sauce and whipped cream (if used).
